heading: Expedited treatment of certain claims
label: 7112 Expedited treatment of certain claims
notes: Amendments2022— substituted “certain” for “remanded” in section catchline, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and inserted heading, and added subsecs. (b) and (c).Pub. L. 117–300
amendments: Amendments2022— substituted “certain” for “remanded” in section catchline, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and inserted heading, and added subsecs. (b) and (c).Pub. L. 117–300

children.heading: .—Remanded Claims
children.label: a .—Remanded Claims
children.text: The Secretary shall take such actions as may be necessary to provide for the expeditious treatment by the Board of any claim that is remanded to the Secretary by the Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims.

children.heading: .—Claims Involving Military Sexual Trauma
children.label: b .—Claims Involving Military Sexual Trauma
children.text: The Board shall promptly determine whether a notice of disagreement filed with the Board is a covered case.

children.label: A
children.text: that concerns a claim for compensation based on military sexual trauma; and

children.label: B
children.text: for which the appellant has requested a hearing in the notice of disagreement filed with the Board pursuant to .section 7105 of this title
The term “military sexual trauma” has the meaning given that term in .section 1166 of this title
